CustomField.description: The amount of the most recent Condo/HOA Fee. The most recent Fee is the one with the greatest Effective From date where the Effective From date is less than today's date AND the Effective To date is blank or greater than today's date.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The amount of the most recent Condo/HOA Fee/Lot Rent. The most recent Fee is the one with the greatest Effective From date where the Effective From date is less than today's date AND the Effective To date is blank or greater than today's date.
CustomField.label: Current HOA/Condo Fees
